final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing museum-style Chinese annotated infographic illustration of 中国少数民族服饰.

Style/medium: needs a 国家博物馆展板 / 历史服饰图鉴 / 文博专题信息图 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours; must feel scholarly, restrained, collectible, not poster-like or commercial
Composition: must follow this fixed layout:
  顶部: 中文主标题 + 副标题 + 导语
  左侧: 结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件，配局部特写
  右上: 材质 / 工艺 / 质感区，展示真实纹理小样并附说明
  右中: 纹样 / 色彩 / 寓意区，展示主色板、纹样样本和文化解释
  底部: 穿着顺序 / 构成流程图 + 核心特征总结
  中央主体: 真实人物全身站姿（若服饰体系适合人物展示）或中心器物拆解图
Subject: must include a carefully chosen 中国少数民族服饰 subject — specific ethnic group, garment system, key structural components, material craftsmanship, pattern motifs and their cultural meanings, color symbolism; all chosen autonomously for maximum representativeness and visual richness
Scene/backdrop: must use 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 paper-texture background with subtle aged-paper grain
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral, even, museum-display atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a palette anchored to the authentic colors of the chosen 少数民族服饰, with restrained background tones — exact balance is yours
Materials/textures: needs realistic fabric texture swatches (silk, embroidery, brocade, or relevant material) rendered as true-to-life material samples — exact rendering technique is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all annotation text in 简体中文 — 主标题、副标题、导语、部件引线标注、材质说明、纹样寓意说明、色彩含义说明、核心特征总结; all characters must be legible, correctly written simplified Chinese; absolutely no English, no pinyin, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve complete infographic structure with all five layout zones populated; all text must be 简体中文, clear and readable; central figure or object must be photorealistic or highly detailed illustrative; annotation leader lines must connect accurately to correct structural parts; material swatches must look like real textile samples, not decorative patterns
Avoid: 海报感、影楼感、电商感、动漫感、cosplay感; avoid loose or inaccurate annotation lines; avoid garbled, incorrect, or illegible characters; avoid over-decoration; avoid fake or vague material textures; avoid English or pinyin text anywhere in the image
